top_signals.title: New Zealand to ease golden visa investment criteria to allow philanthropy
top_signals.summary: Demand for New Zealand's golden visa — which offers residency in exchange for investments — has been strong since the government revamped the rules in April 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
